text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Heheh. Look at me shakin' like a leaf in the wind.
It's like I've lost control of my entire body!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hey, hey, this isn't the time for jokes. As if the
great Inari would chicken out before a festival!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: I'm so ready to go, I can barely hold it in!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I'm gonna make sure you're the first to
taste sweet victory! So don't you dare go
anywhere!
